metadata.description: SoulDrop — drop a soul into any machine. One command installs your personal AI assistant, fully automatic: guided interview, persistent memory, auto-forged custom skills, second-brain vault. Pro engine (Claude Code) or Free engine (local Ollama). EN/VI primary; TH/KO/ZH supported.

plugins.name: souldrop
plugins.description: SoulDrop starter for Claude Code: /onboard interview (EN/VI primary; TH/KO/ZH supported) that writes your personalized assistant (CLAUDE.md + memory), auto-forges custom skills for your profession and goal, and sets up an Obsidian-ready second-brain vault — plus core skills for memory, efficiency, leadership, and daily notes
